compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
# WU-2 — Write surface: CLI / library / MCP emit TAG_DELTA

Reroute every *local* tag writer to emit `TAG_DELTA`, and add the new editing
grammar. After this unit the only remaining whole-field `EDIT.tags` writer is the
Jira inbound applier (handled in WU-3). Depends on WU-1 (event type + reducer).

## What / Scope

- `src/rebar/_commands/leaf.py`: reroute `tag`/`untag` (:85-92, :107-114) to emit
  `TAG_DELTA{added:[t]}` / `{removed:[t]}`; preserve existing command-time no-op
  suppression (they already read `current_tags` and return without an event).
- `src/rebar/_commands/composer.py` (`edit_core`, `_EDIT_FIELDS` :254) + the CLI
  arg layer: add `--add-tag`, `--remove-tag`, `--set-tags`.
  - `--set-tags=x,y` compiles to a delta vs locally-observed reduced state:
    `removed=observed−{x,y}`, `added={x,y}−observed` (convergent add-wins).
    `--set-tags=""` clears OBSERVED tags only.
  - Mutual exclusion → error: `--set-tags` with `--add-tag`/`--remove-tag`; the
    same tag in both `--add-tag` and `--remove-tag`.
  - Command-time no-op suppression (drop adds present / removes absent; emit
    nothing if delta empty).
  - **DROP `--tags` from CLI `edit`** (remove from `_EDIT_FIELDS`). Keep
    library/MCP `edit(tags=)` as a DEPRECATED alias for `set_tags`, intercepted as
    a **pre-pass in `edit_core` BEFORE the `_EDIT_FIELDS` validation loop**
    (`composer.py:~273`) — pop `tags` out of `fields` and route to the set-tags
    compile path, so it is neither rejected as unknown nor fed to the old
    wholesale branch. `__init__.py:428` (list→CSV) and `mcp_server.py` both route
    through `edit_core`, so one interception covers both.
- Tag-name validation: reject empty/whitespace-only/control-char names at write
  time (extend the existing trim+drop-empty in `create_core`/`process_edit`).
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py`: `edit_ticket` gains `add_tags`/`remove_tags`/
  `set_tags`; reroute `tag_ticket`/`untag_ticket` to the delta path. (Write tools
  are `{result:<str>}` exemptions — no `outputSchema` work.)
- `create` keeps simple `--tags` (genesis CREATE base — unchanged).

## Delivery / green state

All local interfaces emit `TAG_DELTA`; two-clone convergence works end-to-end via
CLI; deprecated `edit(tags=)` alias still functions. Full suite green.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `leaf.tag`/`untag` emit `TAG_DELTA`; no-op suppression preserved
- [ ] `edit --add-tag/--remove-tag/--set-tags`; `--set-tags` compiles to delta;
      `--set-tags=""` clears observed; mutual-exclusion errors
- [ ] `--tags` removed from CLI `edit`; `edit(tags=)` deprecated alias works via
      pre-pass extraction BEFORE `_EDIT_FIELDS` validation
- [ ] MCP `edit_ticket` add_tags/remove_tags/set_tags; `tag_ticket`/`untag_ticket`
      rerouted
- [ ] Empty/whitespace/control-char tag names rejected
- [ ] Tests: CLI mutual-exclusion errors; two-clone add‖add→both, add‖remove→
      deterministic; set‖add / set‖remove / set‖set table; witnessed +
      unwitnessed historical-base; deprecated alias path
- [ ] Full test suite green
compiled_state.title: WU-2 — Write surface: CLI/library/MCP emit TAG_DELTA
